creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update to dovecot 1.0.10, a security release.

	I also have a pending vuxml.xml patch but please feel free to commit if
anyone has new one, as I am on vacation and Internet connection is not quite ideal.

How-To-Repeat: 	See http://www.dovecot.org/list/dovecot-news/2007-December/000057.html
